tasks.label: build server
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'build\server' | Out-Null; cl /nologo /std:c++17 /EHsc /Zi /I. /I'common' /I'server' /I'client' /I'C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\include' common\Protocol.cpp common\JsonUtil.cpp server\Database.cpp server\PasswordUtil.cpp server\AuthService.cpp server\AccountService.cpp server\TransactionService.cpp server\RequestHandler.cpp server\TcpServer.cpp server\ServerMain.cpp /link /LIBPATH:'C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\lib' ws2_32.lib bcrypt.lib libmysql.lib /OUT:build\server\atm_server.exe /PDB:build\server\atm_server.pdb
tasks.detail: Build ATM server with MSVC and MySQL C API

tasks.label: build client
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'build\client' | Out-Null; cl /nologo /std:c++17 /EHsc /Zi /I. /I'common' /I'client' common\Protocol.cpp common\JsonUtil.cpp client\ClientSocket.cpp client\ClientApp.cpp client\ClientMain.cpp /link ws2_32.lib /OUT:build\client\atm_client.exe /PDB:build\client\atm_client.pdb

tasks.label: build all
tasks.detail: Build both ATM server and client
